address: M557+M44, Eartheaven Rd, San Mateo, 1870 Rizal, Pilipinas
tagline: Reaching the lost, building the found.
description: Harvester Mission Central Church located at M557+M44, Eartheaven Rd, San Mateo, 1870 Rizal, Philippines promotes a united community and spiritual growth through their meaningful activities. The church is known for their community service programs , innovative worship methods , and in-depth biblical teaching that is relevant to the modern age. It provides solid spiritual guidance and serves as a haven of hope for members and visitors. The organized structure and warm welcome to all who seek faith have solidified their reputation as a leading religious institution in the region..

tagline: Grace for every season of life.
description: Grace Community Church is a warm, welcoming congregation that believes in the transforming power of God's grace. We are passionate about community, the Scriptures, and serving the city of Quezon.

tagline: He is the bread that satisfies.
description: Bread of Life Ministries is a Spirit-filled church with a heart for families, healing, and holistic discipleship. We believe that every person matters to God and that His Word brings life and wholeness.
Victory is a church committed to making disciples who make disciples. With multiple services and ONE discipleship groups, we equip believers to live out their faith boldly in every sphere of society.

tagline: Shining His light in every darkness.
description: Light of the World Church is anchored in compassion and evangelism. We serve the urban poor, minister to children, and train the next generation of faith leaders who will shine God's light into every community.

tagline: Rooted in the Word. Growing in love.
description: Living Word Bible Church is dedicated to expository preaching and deep biblical formation. Our goal is to see every member rooted in Scripture, equipped for ministry, and growing in Christlike character every day.
